title: Crash causes delays on N2 near Maalgate Bridge
description: GEORGE NEWS – Motorists are advised to...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS – Motorists are advised to exercise caution following an accident on the N2 highway near the Maalgate Bridge, heading towards George.


> A silver VW Polo reportedly collided with a truck, resulting in traffic delays in the area. Authorities are on the scene.


At this stage, it is unclear whether anyone sustained injuries or how serious they may be.

More information will be provided as it becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
